feed.title: danielryanspaulding
feed.subtitle: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from danielryanspaulding

entry.title: 3/4 Part Interview with Peace activist Hamza Howidy @hazzah1997 who is one of the first young Gazans speaking out against Hamas. He has written several articles with @newsweek urging protesters worldwide not to glorify or legitimize Hamas & has condemned
entry.content: 3/4 Part Interview with Peace activist Hamza Howidy @hazzah1997 who is one of the first young Gazans speaking out against Hamas. He has written several articles with @newsweek urging protesters worldwide not to glorify or legitimize Hamas & has condemned

entry.title: Gays for Peace! Part 1/4 Interview with Luai Ahmed @justluai an Yemeni Human Rights activist from @buildersofmideast - this is our 4-part talk about growing up Gay in Yemen under radical Islam, an overview of the Houthis: and IRI proxy like Hamas, Arab an

entry.title: @bringomerhome Hey Jon Stewart, I truly believe you have the ability to lead the Left out of the mess we are in. The USA has fallen into extremism — there are no moderates communicating with each other. The Israel-Hamas war is spiraling the left into radi
entry.content: @bringomerhome Hey Jon Stewart, I truly believe you have the ability to lead the Left out of the mess we are in. The USA has fallen into extremism — there are no moderates communicating with each other. The Israel-Hamas war is spiraling the left into radi

entry.title: Part 4/4 of my interview with Yemeni human rights activist Luai Ahmed @justluai — in this segment we cover how harmful the term Pinkwashing is, his experience as a gay refugee in Sweden. We have bonus episode next week of the interview 🌈❤️💕
entry.content: Part 4/4 of my interview with Yemeni human rights activist Luai Ahmed @justluai — in this segment we cover how harmful the term Pinkwashing is, his experience as a gay refugee in Sweden. We have bonus episode next week of the interview 🌈❤️💕

entry.title: Joy Behar is a very smart woman. At what point did you all forget that Hamas is a terrorist regime? Or you just want to make excuses for them? Or buy into conspiracy theories? Or live in a delusion that they’re freedom fighters? You’ve been completely rad
entry.content: Joy Behar is a very smart woman. At what point did you all forget that Hamas is a terrorist regime? Or you just want to make excuses for them? Or buy into conspiracy theories? Or live in a delusion that they’re freedom fighters? You’ve been completely rad

entry.title: Today I went to Sheba rehabilitation hospital to talk with wounded IDF soldiers recovering from near-fatal injuries. This is Ram Cohen @ram_cohen99 who was severely burned & injured in an explosion caused by Hamas stored ammunition which is everywhere in

entry.title: Noa Argamani was kidnapped by a terrorist organization & held captive in Gaza by an Al Jazeera journalist. Al Jazeera is a Qatari news agency working in collaboration with the Islamic Republic of Iran to spread lies & distortions about Israel & the war. @
entry.content: Noa Argamani was kidnapped by a terrorist organization & held captive in Gaza by an Al Jazeera journalist. Al Jazeera is a Qatari news agency working in collaboration with the Islamic Republic of Iran to spread lies & distortions about Israel & the war. @

entry.title: This is the Ideological subversion of the west through Antizionism — explained from Jon Stewart’s monologue about Iran bombing Israel. Jon scapegoated Israel for US domestic problems & got his audience to cheer on the potential mass murder of millions. Th

entry.title: Wake up! It is a terrorist movement to destroy the West. I dont know how much clearer it can be!
entry.content: Wake up! It is a terrorist movement to destroy the West. I dont know how much clearer it can be!

entry.title: CYNTHIA NIXON : are you going to CONDEMN the Pro-Terrorist mob outside the @novaexhibition — or do you support Pro-Hamas mobs on the streets of New York City? WE ALL WANT TO KNOW. @justlikethatmax @hbo @gildedagehbo #cynthianixon #andjustlikethat #hbo #gi

entry.title: This is the Great Lie of our time. We need to learn how to explain & explain it over & over again as much as possible. Surrender Hamas 🕊 Release the Hostages 🕊 #israel #telaviv #thegreatlie #thewestisnext
